data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. DISCO PRINCE was back in winning form last time with a dominant 4L win over 2000m at Mudgee. Up in the weights but a top chance again. 2. ATTACK FORCE is a fellow last start winner, arriving just in time to shed his maiden tag at Toowoomba. Full of confidence now and deserves respect. 7. LIBBY finds it tough to notch up her second win but is knocking on the door. Lacks early speed but can give them a scare late if they overcook it in front. 5. CHARLIE BALI has struggled to threaten of late but should find this a bit easier and gets in weight relief again with a claimer engaged. Not forgetting.","runners":[1,2,7,5],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: ARMIDALE-R5-Fav Out
